violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person trained as a Food Safety Manager was present during time of inspection. Establishment must have employees trained as Food Safety Managers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Soap and paper towel was not available at the hand-washing sink in the basement kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Establishment was lacking sanitizer for the three bay sink. Establishment obtained chlorine sanitizer during time of inspection. Serving spoons/utensils sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The three bay sink is lacking drain stoppers. Drain stoppers are required for proper wash, rinse, and sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The floor in the upstairs kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The floor coving in the upstairs kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and reach-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The floor in the kitchen area under prep-table has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and reach-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
